description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named latex that runs in the default test stage using the runner's default Docker image (no explicit image). The job executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy; apt-get install -y shellcheck; shellcheck -e SC2140 $(git ls-files '*.sh'); apt-get install -y libperl-critic-perl; perlcritic latexpand; apt-get install -y texlive-latex-base texlive-bibtex-extra biber texlive-latex-extra poppler-utils perl-doc; ./tests/autotest.sh; apt-get install -y zip; make dist/latexpand.zip && test -f dist/latexpand.zip. It archives the generated dist/latexpand.zip as an artifact that expires after one year. No caches, variables, services, or conditional rules are defined.
